decisions.relationship_evidence: Generated 136 genomes and performed an in-depth phylogeographic analysis to define transmission-risk areas and infer geographic infection sources.
Used Bayesian phylogenetic trait diffusion and phylogeographic analysis to infer the origin and regional spread of HIV-1 CRF59_01B in China.
Applied Bayesian phylogeographic analysis to reconstruct the origin and migration pathways of wheat yellow mosaic virus in China and Japan.
Used phylogenetic, phylodynamic, and phylogeographic analyses to reconstruct A/H3N2 introductions and dissemination within Australia.
Performed a Bayesian phylogeographic study to estimate the measles outbreak introduction point and its timing in Tunisia.
Subjected near-complete canine parvovirus genomes to phylogeographic analysis and inferred introduction into India from China.
Analyzed worldwide CV-A16 genomes and explicitly performed phylogeographic analysis of their distribution.
Used travel-aware phylogeographic analysis incorporating travel histories to estimate the origin and international entries of SARS-CoV-2 B.1.214.2.
Reconstructed Wesselsbron virus spatial and temporal dispersal across Africa and modeled long-distance movements.
Performed phylogeographic analysis to investigate porcine circovirus 2 dispersal patterns and frequencies.
Introduces Phylogenetic Integrated Velocity models that explicitly model lineage velocity and demonstrates improved dispersal estimates and predictions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and evaluation source for a new predictive phylogeographic model family.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performed Bayesian phylogeographical analysis of Oropouche virus genomes, including travel histories, to reconstruct exportations from Amazonia.
Used phylogeographic approaches to reconstruct short- and long-distance Oropouche virus dispersal and estimate diffusion velocities.
Employed Bayesian phylogeographic reconstruction to compare Alpha and Delta introductions and spatiotemporal diffusion across Cambodia.
Combined global genomic phylogeny with Bayesian evolutionary analysis to infer geographic transmission routes of Vibrio parahaemolyticus.
Applied discrete and continuous phylogeographic analyses to infer WNV-2 migration routes and the role of Serbia in Balkan dissemination.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete West Nile virus phylogeography application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used phylodynamics and phylogeography on global and newly sequenced WNV genomes to trace lineage 1 entry and circulation in Italy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete West Nile virus phylogeography application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzed global Morganella genomes with Bayesian evolutionary methods to estimate ancestry and potential international transmission routes.
Used phylodynamic and phylogeographic analyses to reconstruct Yellow fever virus ancestry and geographic dispersal across Africa.
Applied complete-genome phylodynamic and phylogeographic analyses to estimate global origins, migration patterns, and spread of HCV genotypes.
Conducted a global phylogeographic and genomic investigation of KPC-producing Pseudomonas aeruginosa, linking phylogenetic groups with countries and dissemination patterns.
Combined phylogeny, geographic mapping, population structure, and gene-flow analysis to characterize worldwide Theileria orientalis dispersal.
Performed phylogeographic analysis across Brazil to identify regions acting as exporters and importers of Omicron sublineages.
Provides a localized web platform that visualizes spatiotemporal phylogeographic reconstructions for Orthohantavirus hantanense.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software implementation supporting viral phylogeographic inference and visualization.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applied multiple phylodynamic and phylogeographic approaches to reconstruct chicken infectious anemia virus origins, introductions, and worldwide dispersal.
Performed Bayesian phylogeographical analysis to estimate cross-border migration rates and transmission links for drug-resistant Salmonella Enteritidis.
Combined SARS-CoV-2 genomes with spatial data in a phylogeographic framework to infer international introductions and domestic dissemination in Iran.
Used phylodynamic and phylogeographic approaches to infer the likely origin and migration route of a canine parvovirus strain introduced into Italy.
Used genome-based phylodynamic methods to reconstruct watermelon mosaic virus introductions, subsequent diffusion, and dispersal speeds in France.
Used phylogenetic analysis and geographic clustering to infer trade-driven and environmental dispersal patterns of mandariviruses.
Performed global phylogeographic analysis to describe the spatiotemporal distribution and evolutionary trajectory of carbapenem-resistant Morganella.
Used phylodynamic and phylogeographic analyses to trace the spatiotemporal spread of a multidrug-resistant Shigella outbreak genotype.
Analyzed phylogenetic separation and geographic distributions of HBV subgenotype C1 rt269L and rt269I types.
Conducted phylogenetic and phylogeographic analyses to trace the origin and transmission route of a Portuguese West Nile virus isolate.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete West Nile virus phylogeography application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used molecular-clock and phylogeographic analysis to infer the historical origin and international spread of Coxsackievirus A-24 variants.
Extends existing approaches, develops three novel landscape phylogeographic methods, and evaluates them with two simulation frameworks.
Used mitochondrial sequence diversity, haplogroups, and geographic population comparisons to study Dermacentor variabilis phylogeography.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vector-population phylogeography application in a tick-borne-disease setting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an exact structured-coalescent Bayesian method with reversible-jump MCMC, validates it by simulation, and implements it in a new R package.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development source for a pathogen-phylogeography inference method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used phylogeographic reconstruction to distinguish persistent cryptic Yellow fever virus circulation in Colombia from repeated external introductions.
Applied discrete and continuous phylogeographic analyses to infer reassortment location and subsequent H5N1 dispersal across Europe.
Performed phylogeographic analysis of 4,418 SARS-CoV-2 genomes to estimate transmission within university residences.
Analyzed the geographic structure, global distribution, and cross-region spread of viruses associated with Phytophthora cinnamomi under an explicitly phylogeographic study framing.
Performed discrete phylogeographic analysis of 18,529 BA.5 sequences to reconstruct international introductions and domestic US transmission.
Analyzed DENV-1 genetic diversity, phylodynamics, and phylogeography to distinguish local dispersion from a new lineage introduction.
Compared phylogenetic and geographic patterns to identify trans-regional transmission of H4N9 influenza viruses.
Used phylogenetic and phylogeographic methods to infer that Malawi cholera outbreak strains originated from Pakistan.
Applied Bayesian phylogeographic inference to reconstruct the global origin and migration history of soybean mosaic virus.
Performed phylogeographic analysis of African swine fever virus genomes to estimate dispersal dynamics and regional transmission chains in Europe.
Used phylogeographical analysis and Bayesian clustering of global Salmonella Panama genomes to examine zoonotic clustering across countries and sources.
Reconstructed Rice yellow mottle virus phylogeography from hundreds of isolates and compared inferred dispersal with historical trade, cultivation, and war.
Used phylogeographical analysis to relate dairy-waste E. coli strains to geographically dispersed human, animal, and environmental clones.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete antimicrobial-resistant E. coli phylogeography application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applied phylogeographic analysis with a molecular clock to infer introduction of a Salmonella Enteritidis lineage into South Korea from the United Kingdom.
Used mitochondrial and nuclear markers for phylogeographic and population-genetic analysis of Dirofilaria immitis in the Canary Islands.
Extends existing approaches, develops three novel landscape phylogeographic methods, and evaluates their statistical performance using simulations.
Performed Bayesian phylogeographic reconstruction to estimate wheat streak mosaic virus origin and global dispersal routes.
Performed phylogeographic analysis of tick-borne pathogens and compared their geographic patterns with vector population structure.
Used multifaceted phylodynamic and spatiotemporal modeling of H5N1 genomes to identify transcontinental spread areas and lineage replacements.
Used simulated HIV epidemics to test bias and estimation performance of phylodynamic and phylogeographic methods under model misspecification and varying sample sizes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit simulation-based evaluation of phylogeographic inference robustness.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducted Bayesian phylogenetic and phylogeographic analyses to infer repeated H5N1 introductions and diffusion through Serbia and the Balkans.
Applied phylogenetic, phylodynamic, and phylogeographic approaches to estimate PRRSV migration rates, dispersal speeds, and geographic risk factors.
Performed Bayesian phylogeographic analysis of equine influenza genes to infer the probable origins of the Tunisian outbreak virus.
Applied phylodynamic analyses to newly sequenced Hantaan virus genomes and reported evolutionary divergence and phylogeographic diversity across Jeju Island.
Used phylogeographic analysis of African Staphylococcus aureus genomes to characterize regional spread of antimicrobial-resistance genes.
Used phylogeographic reconstruction to identify two host-associated H5N1 transmission routes into Uruguay.
Used phylogeographic and phylodynamic tools to quantify H5 spread velocity and identify farm-density and proximity drivers in France.
Used phylogeographic modeling to estimate at least 14 human-metapneumovirus introductions into Côte d'Ivoire.
Performed worldwide phylogeographic analysis of Proteus mirabilis genomes to characterize geographic prevalence of NDM variants.
Uses simulations to assess standard and adjusted Bayes factors under sampling bias, estimating error rates and providing implementation guidance for discrete phylogeography.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance evaluation of a discrete-phylogeographic support statistic.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applied continuous- and discrete-space phylogeographic models to estimate foot-and-mouth disease virus dispersal, direction, velocity, and drivers.
Used mitochondrial markers and geographic population comparisons to infer the origins and expansion history of Hyalomma marginatum in France.
Used maximum-likelihood phylogeographic methods to infer SARS-CoV-2 introductions into Canada and evaluate travel restrictions.
Used phylogeographic analyses to reconstruct infectious bronchitis virus diffusion and test demographic, trade, and environmental drivers.
Performed phylogeographic analyses and reconstructions to identify multiple SFTSV introductions and Thailand's role in subsequent regional spread.
Used whole-genome phylogenetic structure and geographic evidence to infer the origin and trade-mediated dispersal of Bacillus anthracis lineages.
Develops a Markov-decision-process framework for optimizing genomic sampling, including sampling for migration-rate inference between subpopulations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological-development source addressing sampling design for phylogeographic inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzed 1,818 H5N1 sequences to infer multiple continental introductions, flyway dissemination, and host-specific transmission patterns.
Applied discrete phylogeographic models to CVA6 sequences to reconstruct interprovincial transmission and geographic structure.
Analyzed mitochondrial haplotypes, phylogenetic relationships, population structure, and geographic patterns of Hyalomma marginatum across Corsica.
The study reports geographic frequencies and genomic diversity of blaNDM-9-carrying E. coli but does not explicitly perform phylogeographic reconstruction or genomic-diffusion inference.
decisions.lineage_evidence: No genuine lineage lead for this exact concept is established.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Used 614 Yersinia pestis genomes spanning 96 years to infer a single introduction, local diversification, persistence, and expansion within Madagascar.
Applied Bayesian spatiotemporal analysis and phylogeographic analysis to identify African enterovirus transmission hubs and global circulation patterns.
Applied phylogeographic analysis to 1,572 poliovirus sequences to compare historical and current international spread patterns.
Conducted phylogeographic analysis of Mycoplasma pneumoniae isolates to identify rapid mixing among sampled Chinese regions.
Conducted a comparative genomic and phylogeographic analysis of worldwide foot-and-mouth disease virus genomes, including geographic clustering and regional recombination patterns.
Introduces an integrated software toolkit that streamlines sequence curation, spatiotemporal subsampling, migration analysis, molecular dating, and visualization for viral phylogeography.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit stand-alone software implementation for phylogeographic analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combined clinical-isolate genotyping, phylogenetic reconstruction, and nationwide geographic distributions to characterize Orientia tsutsugamushi phylogeographic diversity.
Performed phylogeographic analysis of nearly 50,000 SARS-CoV-2 genomes to trace lineage origins and movements within and beyond Peru.
Applied phylogeographic analysis to three genome segments to infer the origin and intercontinental expansion of tomato spotted wilt virus.
Used phylodynamic and phylogeographic approaches on more than 3,000 chikungunya genomes to reconstruct within-island dispersal paths and drivers.
Used discrete and continuous phylogeographic reconstruction to infer WNV-2 origin, introduction into Italy, and subsequent east-west spread.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete West Nile virus phylogeography application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combined Coxiella sequence phylogeny, haplotype diversity, and geographic evidence from Mexican and global tick-associated records under a phylogeographic analysis.
Used temporal and phylogeographic inference to support recent regional introduction of DENV-3 into Paraguay rather than local persistence.
Performed spatiotemporal Bayesian phylogeographic analysis to infer multiple equine-influenza introductions into Africa and their probable sources.
Uses analytical and simulation approaches to quantify sampling-driven bias in detection and timing of importations inferred by phylogeographic methods.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological diagnosis of phylogeographic importation estimates.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combined viral genomes with continuous phylogeographic inference to reconstruct H5 spread and test environmental drivers of diffusion velocity.
Analyzed approximately 200,000 tuberculosis genomes to infer the origin and international migration events of a multidrug-resistant lineage.
Performed retrospective phylodynamic analysis and phylogeographic reconstructions to infer SARS-CoV-2 variant introductions into Guinea.
Applied sampling-aware ancestral-state inference to global and Malawian tuberculosis genomes to reconstruct importation, exportation, and within-city movement.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete tuberculosis phylogeography application using a named sampling-aware method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a parallel algorithmic restructuring of structured-coalescent likelihood computation, benchmarks its speed and estimates, and integrates it into software packages.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological-development source for scalable phylogeographic inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Integrated phylodynamic and phylogeographic analyses to map global H7 influenza dissemination and quantify host and environmental drivers.
